question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?animal WHERE {
  ?operation wdt:P31 wd:Q645883 .
  ?operation wdt:P527 wd:Q625657 .
  ?operation wdt:P1963 ?animal .
}

How many spouses do head of states have on average?
Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?
Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?verb ?lemma WHERE {
  ?verb wdt:P31 wd:Q17278755 .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?verb), "uş"))
  ?verb wdt:P1963 ?lemma .
}

question.string: From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?winnerCount) WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q19020.
  ?winner wdt:P31 wd:Q5.
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country.
} GROUP BY ?country ORDER BY DESC(?winnerCount) LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1.

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?

query.sparql: SELECT ?musicStyle WHERE { wd:Q158895 wdt:P136 ?musicStyle . FILTER(?musicStyle = wd:Q11399) }

question.string: Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?
has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?
has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?year ?lifeExpectancy WHERE {
  ?entity wdt:P373 "life expectancy in iran" .
  ?entity wdt:P585 ?year .
  ?entity wdt:P2250 ?lifeExpectancy .
  FILTER(?year > 1999)
}

question.string: has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?population WHERE {
  wd:Q1028 wdt:P1082 ?population .
  ?time wdt:P580 ?date .
  FILTER(?date > "2006-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}

How many studio albums has Lana Del Rey have?

In how many years did Kobe Bryant receive an NBA All-Defensive Team award?
How many All-NBA Team awards have Shaquille O'Neal and Kobe Bryant received in the same year?
How many literary works did Richard Bachman write?
How many notable works does Sarah J. Maas have?

How many children (including apopted ones) does Jeff Bezos have with his ex-wife?
How many children had Paul McCartney together with his ex-wife Linda McCartney?
How many Chinese zodiac animals are there in total?
How many cities are part of the Pearl River Delta?
How many city-states are currently in the world?
How many businesses did Steve Jobs found?
How many countries have a democracy index higher than 7 and drive on the left side ?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (COUNT(?country) AS ?countryCount) WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P1963 ?index .
  ?country wdt:P1282 wd:Q6256 .
  FILTER(?index > 7)
}

how many emmy awards has the tv series game of thrones won?
How many films are derived from the original Ghost in the Shell Manga?
How many French kings didn't die of natural causes?
How many given names has Queen Elizabeth II ?
How many different female mayors did Hamburg have?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?mayor) AS ?female_mayors_count) WHERE {
  ?mayor wdt:P31 wd:Q747279 .
  ?mayor wdt:P206 wd:Q1055 .
  ?mayor wdt:P1539 ?female_population .
  FILTER(?female_population > 0)
}

question.string: How many public holidays does the state Bavaria have in a year?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (COUNT(?work) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?work wdt:P31 wd:Q131819891 .
  ?work wdt:P50 wd:Q482980 .
  FILTER(?work != wd:Q82464)
}

question.string: how many official languages does the united states of america have?

How many people have won the Nobel Prize in Literature since its inception?
How many people live in cities in the vicinity of the Nile ?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (SUM(?population) AS ?totalPopulation) WHERE {
  ?city wdt:P31 wd:Q15735494.
  ?city wdt:P527 ?area.
  ?area wdt:P31 wd:Q105646109.
  ?city wdt:P1082 ?population.
}

question.string: How many pitch classes are part of the chromatic scale?
how many plays has William Shakespeare written in the 16th century.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (COUNT(?play) AS ?numberOfPlays) WHERE {
  ?play wdt:P31 wd:Q161 .
  ?play wdt:P577 ?publicationDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?publicationDate) >= 1500 && YEAR(?publicationDate) < 1600) .
  ?play wdt:P50 wd:Q692 .
}

SELECT ?mission WHERE {

}
